final_prompt.prompt:
Create a Xiaohongshu cover post for a casual creator's first impression review of DJI Pocket 4, designed for the warm handbook tonality of the platform.

Style/medium: Xiaohongshu cover post with the approachable warmth of a friend's handwritten recommendation, designed for casual creator sharing
Composition: 9-grid layout with the DJI Pocket 4 as central anchor, generous breathing room around the product, title positioned prominently at center
Subject: DJI Pocket 4 handheld gimbal camera as hero product, surrounded by lifestyle context hints (travel moments, daily vlogging scenes)
Scene/backdrop: soft neutral studio-like setting with gentle lifestyle props suggesting casual creator authenticity
Lighting/mood: the soft diffused light of a cozy afternoon, inviting trust and curiosity
Color palette: warm honey tones with playful accent colors, the gentle confidence of a friend's genuine recommendation
Materials/textures: matte paper-like surfaces, soft shadows, approachable tactile quality
Text (verbatim): 大强pocket4初体验
Constraints: 9-grid structure visible, product clearly identifiable as DJI Pocket 4, title font must be cute and differentiated from standard system fonts
Avoid: overly polished commercial aesthetic, generic stock photo look, cold corporate photography style
